recipe.notes: Tags: Side, Normal, potatoes, cream of potato soup, sour cream
recipe.title: Hash Brown Potato Casserole

steps.instruction: Pour into a greased 13 X 9-inch baking dish that has been sprayed with Pam.
Cut the butter into about 8-12 little pieces and place on top of the potatoes (this is optional).
Sprinkle a little paprika over top for color.
Bake uncovered at 350F degrees for 1 ½ hours.
